任务管理

报告

声音与通知

集成

快速访问

cn.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

cn.releaseNotes:
【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
cn.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

cn.description:
这一次，你可以通过图形化来学习和弦、音阶。通过移动不同的和弦音来了解和弦的构成。你将彻底的了解和弦名称的由来。此App能够生成所有你能想到和弦构成，方便你查询记忆。理解音乐的过程，应该是清晰且简单的。GenChord帮你揭示音乐背后的核心原理。更多功能正在持续更新，敬请期待！

· Library查询：和弦速查。从乐理层面生成所有可能性，不要怀疑全不全了，几万个和弦。中文用户友好，所有和弦名都有中文翻译。点按可以发声，长按可以分解，右滑可以看详情，里面有这个和弦的所有解释。功能媲(diao)美(da)某本速查大全书。

· Query 查询：和弦反查。反查基础和弦/omit和弦/转位和弦/所有加上tension的和弦。在playground中还支持蓝牙链接/Midi线连接。现在你能享受到以前只有PC用户才能用到的功能。

· Create创作：属于你的和弦，收集和弦进行。更多的控制功能，添加记忆曲线，添加简谱音名。自由排列组合，一个和弦进化出无限种构成。流行/爵士小助手，你值得拥有。

· Playground游乐场：用于教学、训练、测试，是你玩音乐的自由空间、是你创作的瑞士军刀。特别推荐 顺阶和弦（diatonic chord）功能，探索好听的和弦进行。随时随地点按出动人的音符。所有实验性功能都放到这里面。

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

cn.trackName: 无尽坦克大战 - 八位元单机王者 完美模拟穿越旧经典电视手游
cn.description:
经典到不能再经典的小霸王红白机坦克, 小时候发梦也在玩. 在2012年我们为了延续儿时回忆, 开发了超级坦克大战, 很多人到现在也天天玩, 除了好玩外, 因为我们提供了500张地图. 天天玩, 玩了多年也还未玩完.

由于游戏引擎老化问题, 我们很难在超级坦克大战的基础上加入新功能. 所以我们决定开发新的坦克大战, "无尽坦克大战", 延续经典回忆.

作为经典的延续无尽坦克大战, 包含了所有经典元素, 改良了的新特点.
保证你可以玩到下一个十年.

游戏重点:
- 防御你的基地
- 摧毁所有敌方坦克
- 加入超级坦克大战500张传奇地图

无尽坦克大战, 是个跨平台游戏, 你可以在不同平台上找到它的踪影.
游戏会不定期更新, 目标是1000张地图.

hk.trackName: 拒之-骚扰电话批量拦截助手
hk.releaseNotes:
【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
hk.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

hk.description:
這一次，你可以透過圖形化來學習和弦、音階。透過移動不同的和弦音來了解和弦的構成。你將徹底地了解和弦名稱的由來。此 App 能夠生成所有你能想到的和弦構成，方便你查詢記憶。理解音樂的過程，應當是清晰且簡單的。GenChord 幫你揭示音樂背後的核心原理。

・Library 查詢：和弦速查。從樂理層面生成所有可能性，不用懷疑全不全了，幾萬個和弦。中文用戶友好，所有和弦名都有中文翻譯。點按可以發聲，長按可以分解，右滑可以看詳情，裡面有這個和弦的所有解釋。功能媲美某本速查大全書。

・Query 查詢：和弦反查。反查基礎和弦 /omit 和弦 / 轉位和弦 / 所有加上 tension 的和弦。還有，在 playground 中還支援藍牙連結。現在你能享受到以前只有 PC 用戶才能用到的功能。

・Create 創作：屬於你的和弦，收集和弦進行。更多的控制功能，新增記憶曲線，新增簡譜音名。自由排列組合，一個和弦演化出無限種構成。流行 / 爵士小幫手，你值得擁有。

・Playground 遊樂場：用於教學、訓練、測試，是你玩音樂的自由空間、是你創作的瑞士軍刀。特別推薦 順階和弦（diatonic chord）功能，探索好聽的和弦進行。隨時隨地點按出動人的音符。所有實驗性功能都放進這裡面。

hk.description:
您是否對相同的舊小說感到厭倦？您是否對交互式故事遊戲、視覺小說、聊天類社交遊戲和獨立遊戲感興趣，但是您已經厭倦了相同的舊遊戲？如果是這樣，您應該查看《七天》，一部視覺小說、決策性的神秘遊戲。

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰
- 根據故事的不同情節和結局
- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

■ 推薦給那些誰：
- 對文字 / 互動內容感興趣，例如視覺小說、故事遊戲、聊天遊戲和社交遊戲
-對獨特的獨立遊戲充滿熱情，例如《傳說之下》
- 正在尋找帶有神秘和 / 或恐怖元素的講故事遊戲
- 正在尋找終極遊戲，因為他們厭倦了平常的故事類遊戲
- 對其他類型的冒險遊戲感興趣
- 我們還推薦《黑暗界辦公室：鬼怪遊戲》，這是我們的又一款出色的遊戲。

■ 我們保證它會很有趣。立即下載並體驗

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

■ 我們需要您的支持，以製作更好的故事遊類戲。請將此故事遊戲推薦給您的家人和朋友。這將對我們有很大的幫助。

《帕夏星球：重生》是台灣獨立遊戲團隊——藍蠍遊戲的初試啼聲之作。獨樹一格的療癒手繪場景、輕鬆的推理風格、圍繞著日常展開的遊戲主線，都將帶給玩家不同於以往的沉浸式解謎體驗。

【遊戲概要】
故事發生在遙遠的帕夏星。那裡有座位於地底的繁榮城市，住著一群可愛的汪星人。他們過著日復一日的和平生活，享受著科技帶來的便利。然而，從小在城中長大的主角波比卻時常幻想著走出封閉的地下城，去看看外頭的世界。而遊戲主線正是由此展開的。玩家將會化身波比，在看似平靜安逸，實際上卻面臨能源耗竭危機的城市裡探索，透過挑戰層層關卡，解開最終謎團，在災難來臨前找出拯救所有居民的方法！

組合強大的猴子塔和令人敬畏的英雄，打造完美防綫，擊破所有入侵的氣球！

超過十年的塔防遊戲開發經驗和定期的大規模更新讓《Bloons TD 6》成為數百萬玩家最喜愛的遊戲。現在就玩《Bloons TD 6》，享受無盡的策略遊戲樂趣！

海量內容更新！
*定期更新！ 我們每年都會發佈幾個更新，推出新的角色、功能和玩法。
*頭目活動！ 可怕的頭目氣球將挑戰最強大的防線。
*征程模式！完成由一系列地圖組成的戰鬥，通常按主題、規則和獎勵劃分。
*爭議領土！和其他玩家組成戰隊，攜手對抗五支其他戰隊，爭奪領土。奪取共同地圖上的地塊，在排行榜上展開競爭。
*任務！ 透過任務深入瞭解猴子的特點，體驗精彩劇情並分享知識。
* 獎盃商店！ 賺取獎盃即可解鎖幾十種裝飾品，並自訂猴子、氣球、動畫、音樂等等。
* 內容瀏覽器！建立你自己的挑戰和征程模式，然後與其他玩家分享，並檢視最受歡迎和玩家最多的社群內容。

史詩級猴子塔和英雄！
* 25種強力猴子塔，每一種都有三條升級路線和不同的激活技能。
* 巔峰！ 探索最新的巔峰升級所帶來的不可思議的力量。
* 17個不同的英雄，每一個都有20項標誌性的升級和2個特殊技能，另有皮膚和配音等待你去解鎖！


精彩無限！
* 4人合作！ 在公開或私人遊戲中與多達3個其他玩家一起暢玩每張地圖和每種模式。 
* 隨時隨地暢玩 – 即時沒有WiFi，也可通過單人模式享受遊戲樂趣！
* 70+張手工繪製地圖，每次更新都會新增更多地圖。
* 猴子知識！超過100項元升級，根據需要提升力量！
* 力量和即時猴子！享受透過遊戲，活動和成就獲得！ 立即提升力量，助你應對棘手的地圖和模式。



我們儘可能多地將大量內容放入每一次更新，我們會繼續通過定期更新為你帶來新的功能、內容和挑。
我們十分尊重你投入的時間和提供的支持，我們希望《Bloons TD 6》成為你玩過的最優秀的戰略遊戲。
如果遊戲未能達到你的理想，請透過https://support.ninjakiwi.com與我們聯絡，告訴我們如何改進！
那些氣球可不會乖乖束手就擒……做好戰鬥準備，開始《Bloons TD 6》吧！

hk.description:
《泰拉瑞亞》是一款經典動作遊戲元素與超高自由度創造完美結合的沙盒遊戲。玩家將從零開始，積累資源，建造家園，於2D像素畫風世界中自由馳騁。

【買斷制無內購的完整體驗】
此次發售的泰拉瑞亞， 將是完全買斷制的無內購版本，玩家在購買後將可以體驗遊戲的全內容。

Q：此次泰拉瑞亞PE版發售的版本是？
此次上線的遊戲版本是1.4.0.5，最新的1.4.3版本將在後續進行更新。由於心動版的《泰拉瑞亞》在引進之初，加入了例如【免費官方伺服器連線】【雲存檔】【語音聊天】等輔助功能，這也使得我們需要在外服PE的代碼上做額外開發，使得更新會有一定延遲。 目前植入工作已經在緊鑼密鼓的進行中，我們將在7月很快同步更新至1.4.3版本。對此給您帶來的不便，非常抱歉。如果因為版本滯後給您帶來了困擾，建議您可以先申請退款，在我們更新後再考慮入手，屆時我們也會同步開啟折扣。

Q：是否能與外服PE連線？
此次心動版的泰拉瑞亞為了給廣大移動端玩家提供更好的連線體驗，加入了官方服務器支持，而該功能需要依賴相同的遊戲版本。故我們發售的版本將不能支持與外服PE版本的私人服務器連線。如果是希望體驗更多私人服務器的版本，依舊建議大家優先考慮購買外服版本。

【遊戲特色】
對於那些新玩家們，《泰拉瑞亞》是一款總會給你不斷的驚喜的遊戲。
- 遊戲裡豐富的時間系統及天氣系統，四季與晝夜的交替，帶月荷鋤歸，說的就是你的生活。
- 玩家可通過成熟的物材合成系統，利用地圖上的資源，開始你的屠龍寶刀與金屋藏嬌的建造計劃吧！
-玩家可探索超過20個地圖，可以體驗到茂密的森林，荒蕪的沙漠，或是偶遇神秘的漂浮島，誤闖擁有童話般鮮豔明快色彩的神聖之地等等。
- 開放了300+不同的敵人和怪物，20+風格迥異的Boss，讓玩家體驗到酣暢淋漓的遊戲戰鬥系統。
- 遊戲擁有超過20名NPC可供玩家進行售賣道具、獲取治療、信息諮詢等互動：如治療玩家並幫助消除debuff的護士，出售各種機械的機械師，出售坐騎和寵物的動物學家等等。
- 遊戲內總道具數已超過3500個，玩家可通過掉落拾取、合成製作等方式獲取到建築材料、人物時裝、坐騎、稀有寶石等道具，以探索遊戲內的無限樂趣。
- 遊戲擁有極高的自由度，在這裡沒有任何需要玩家強制執行的主線或支線任務，有的只是白晝與黑夜的輪番更替。玩家不受任何人或事的限制，縱情的自由遊玩。
- 遊戲中始終充滿了輕鬆的打擊樂，富有打擊感的挖掘聲、怪物受到攻擊的聲音都讓遊戲充滿了趣味性。

人類踏足新世界，第一步需要的是勇氣，第二步需要的是朋友！

每日英语阅读，专为英语学习者打造，精听细读助你更好学英语。软件不仅会根据你的英文水平，每天推送地道的短文和原著，更有文件导入、单词本学习等功能，等你来体验。每天十分钟，养成阅读好习惯！

【资源丰富，每日更新】
编辑精选的英语文章，只需三分钟，轻松积累实用词汇，学习地道鲜活表达；
丰富的英文读物：经典名著、短篇小说、迪士尼·皮克斯电影双语阅读、少儿读物、名人演讲......原声朗读、双语字幕，带你感受原汁原味的阅读体验；
精听党：名著原声朗读，高亮双语字幕，结合干货知识点讲义和课后习题巩固，再也不用担心名著读不懂啦。

【每日外刊，深度专业】
选自主流的英美外刊，美国本土外教纯正发音朗读；
专业英语教师逐字逐句精讲，单词、语法、发音知识一网打尽；
每天2-3道练习题和配套答案详解，助你测评当天学习效果。

【功能强大、操作便捷】
划词搜索：与《欧路词典》无缝集成，长按查词，即指即译；
播放调节：8档语速调节、4种译文切换，满足不同阶段的学习需求；
智能提示：重点单词、各大考试（四六级、考研、托福GRE雅思等）的高频词，可在文章中自动标注，单词学习更高效；
生词学习：文章中长按即可查词并加入生词本，全平台同步，更有卡片播放等复习模式助你学习；
统计图表：每天的阅读记录都会通过图表生动展示，记录你一点一滴的坚持与努力；

mo.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

mo.releaseNotes:
【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
mo.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

mo.description:
您是否對相同的舊小說感到厭倦？您是否對交互式故事遊戲、視覺小說、聊天類社交遊戲和獨立遊戲感興趣，但是您已經厭倦了相同的舊遊戲？如果是這樣，您應該查看《七天》，一部視覺小說、決策性的神秘遊戲。

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰
- 根據故事的不同情節和結局
- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

■ 推薦給那些誰：
- 對文字 / 互動內容感興趣，例如視覺小說、故事遊戲、聊天遊戲和社交遊戲
-對獨特的獨立遊戲充滿熱情，例如《傳說之下》
- 正在尋找帶有神秘和 / 或恐怖元素的講故事遊戲
- 正在尋找終極遊戲，因為他們厭倦了平常的故事類遊戲
- 對其他類型的冒險遊戲感興趣
- 我們還推薦《黑暗界辦公室：鬼怪遊戲》，這是我們的又一款出色的遊戲。

■ 我們保證它會很有趣。立即下載並體驗

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

■ 我們需要您的支持，以製作更好的故事遊類戲。請將此故事遊戲推薦給您的家人和朋友。這將對我們有很大的幫助。

mo.description:
《帕夏星球：重生》是台灣獨立遊戲團隊——藍蠍遊戲的初試啼聲之作。獨樹一格的療癒手繪場景、輕鬆的推理風格、圍繞著日常展開的遊戲主線，都將帶給玩家不同於以往的沉浸式解謎體驗。

【遊戲概要】
故事發生在遙遠的帕夏星。那裡有座位於地底的繁榮城市，住著一群可愛的汪星人。他們過著日復一日的和平生活，享受著科技帶來的便利。然而，從小在城中長大的主角波比卻時常幻想著走出封閉的地下城，去看看外頭的世界。而遊戲主線正是由此展開的。玩家將會化身波比，在看似平靜安逸，實際上卻面臨能源耗竭危機的城市裡探索，透過挑戰層層關卡，解開最終謎團，在災難來臨前找出拯救所有居民的方法！

組合強大的猴子塔和令人敬畏的英雄，打造完美防綫，擊破所有入侵的氣球！

超過十年的塔防遊戲開發經驗和定期的大規模更新讓《Bloons TD 6》成為數百萬玩家最喜愛的遊戲。現在就玩《Bloons TD 6》，享受無盡的策略遊戲樂趣！

海量內容更新！
*定期更新！ 我們每年都會發佈幾個更新，推出新的角色、功能和玩法。
*頭目活動！ 可怕的頭目氣球將挑戰最強大的防線。
*征程模式！完成由一系列地圖組成的戰鬥，通常按主題、規則和獎勵劃分。
*爭議領土！和其他玩家組成戰隊，攜手對抗五支其他戰隊，爭奪領土。奪取共同地圖上的地塊，在排行榜上展開競爭。
*任務！ 透過任務深入瞭解猴子的特點，體驗精彩劇情並分享知識。
* 獎盃商店！ 賺取獎盃即可解鎖幾十種裝飾品，並自訂猴子、氣球、動畫、音樂等等。
* 內容瀏覽器！建立你自己的挑戰和征程模式，然後與其他玩家分享，並檢視最受歡迎和玩家最多的社群內容。

史詩級猴子塔和英雄！
* 25種強力猴子塔，每一種都有三條升級路線和不同的激活技能。
* 巔峰！ 探索最新的巔峰升級所帶來的不可思議的力量。
* 17個不同的英雄，每一個都有20項標誌性的升級和2個特殊技能，另有皮膚和配音等待你去解鎖！


精彩無限！
* 4人合作！ 在公開或私人遊戲中與多達3個其他玩家一起暢玩每張地圖和每種模式。 
* 隨時隨地暢玩 – 即時沒有WiFi，也可通過單人模式享受遊戲樂趣！
* 70+張手工繪製地圖，每次更新都會新增更多地圖。
* 猴子知識！超過100項元升級，根據需要提升力量！
* 力量和即時猴子！享受透過遊戲，活動和成就獲得！ 立即提升力量，助你應對棘手的地圖和模式。



我們儘可能多地將大量內容放入每一次更新，我們會繼續通過定期更新為你帶來新的功能、內容和挑。
我們十分尊重你投入的時間和提供的支持，我們希望《Bloons TD 6》成為你玩過的最優秀的戰略遊戲。
如果遊戲未能達到你的理想，請透過https://support.ninjakiwi.com與我們聯絡，告訴我們如何改進！

mo.description:
《泰拉瑞亞》是一款經典動作遊戲元素與超高自由度創造完美結合的沙盒遊戲。玩家將從零開始，積累資源，建造家園，於2D像素畫風世界中自由馳騁。

【買斷制無內購的完整體驗】
此次發售的泰拉瑞亞， 將是完全買斷制的無內購版本，玩家在購買後將可以體驗遊戲的全內容。

Q：此次泰拉瑞亞PE版發售的版本是？
此次上線的遊戲版本是1.4.0.5，最新的1.4.3版本將在後續進行更新。由於心動版的《泰拉瑞亞》在引進之初，加入了例如【免費官方伺服器連線】【雲存檔】【語音聊天】等輔助功能，這也使得我們需要在外服PE的代碼上做額外開發，使得更新會有一定延遲。 目前植入工作已經在緊鑼密鼓的進行中，我們將在7月很快同步更新至1.4.3版本。對此給您帶來的不便，非常抱歉。如果因為版本滯後給您帶來了困擾，建議您可以先申請退款，在我們更新後再考慮入手，屆時我們也會同步開啟折扣。

Q：是否能與外服PE連線？
此次心動版的泰拉瑞亞為了給廣大移動端玩家提供更好的連線體驗，加入了官方服務器支持，而該功能需要依賴相同的遊戲版本。故我們發售的版本將不能支持與外服PE版本的私人服務器連線。如果是希望體驗更多私人服務器的版本，依舊建議大家優先考慮購買外服版本。

【遊戲特色】
對於那些新玩家們，《泰拉瑞亞》是一款總會給你不斷的驚喜的遊戲。
- 遊戲裡豐富的時間系統及天氣系統，四季與晝夜的交替，帶月荷鋤歸，說的就是你的生活。
- 玩家可通過成熟的物材合成系統，利用地圖上的資源，開始你的屠龍寶刀與金屋藏嬌的建造計劃吧！
-玩家可探索超過20個地圖，可以體驗到茂密的森林，荒蕪的沙漠，或是偶遇神秘的漂浮島，誤闖擁有童話般鮮豔明快色彩的神聖之地等等。
- 開放了300+不同的敵人和怪物，20+風格迥異的Boss，讓玩家體驗到酣暢淋漓的遊戲戰鬥系統。
- 遊戲擁有超過20名NPC可供玩家進行售賣道具、獲取治療、信息諮詢等互動：如治療玩家並幫助消除debuff的護士，出售各種機械的機械師，出售坐騎和寵物的動物學家等等。
- 遊戲內總道具數已超過3500個，玩家可通過掉落拾取、合成製作等方式獲取到建築材料、人物時裝、坐騎、稀有寶石等道具，以探索遊戲內的無限樂趣。
- 遊戲擁有極高的自由度，在這裡沒有任何需要玩家強制執行的主線或支線任務，有的只是白晝與黑夜的輪番更替。玩家不受任何人或事的限制，縱情的自由遊玩。
- 遊戲中始終充滿了輕鬆的打擊樂，富有打擊感的挖掘聲、怪物受到攻擊的聲音都讓遊戲充滿了趣味性。

人類踏足新世界，第一步需要的是勇氣，第二步需要的是朋友！

tw.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

tw.description:
專注於任務對於我們這個綁定於螢幕的世代來說是一項真正的挑戰。Be Focused 透過將單個任務分解為不同的時間間隔，並由短暫的休息時間分隔，協助您完成工作。這是一種令人驚訝的有效方法，可保持動力和專注。建立任務、配置休息時間，並在一天、一週或自訂期間內追蹤您的進度。您可以在 iPhone、iPad 或 Mac 上使用 Be Focused — 所有內容都能完美同步。

任務管理

•	建立和管理任務
•	為任務添加備註和截止日期
•	使用標籤和篩選器組織任務
•	從其他應用程式貼上任務清單

計時器控制

•	開始、暫停或跳過間隔
•	自動開始下一個間隔（可選）
•	規劃完成任務所需的間隔並追蹤準確性
•	管理已完成的間隔

計時器自訂

•	設定工作時段、短暫休息和長時間休息的持續時間
•	定義長時間休息前的間隔數量
•	設定每日完成間隔的目標
•	為各個任務分配不同的計時器設定

報告

•	查看詳細報告以監控您的進度
•	將資料匯出為 CSV 格式

聲音與通知

•	可調整頻率的碼錶滴答聲
•	多種鬧鐘聲音
•	互動式通知
•	可調整的鬧鐘和碼錶音量

整合

•	在所有裝置間同步（iPhone、iPad、Mac）*
•	與 Focus Matrix 整合，使用緊急/重要原則管理任務 **
•	與「快捷指令」App 整合，以自動化工作流程

快速存取

•	鎖定畫面和主畫面的小工具
•	鎖定畫面和動態島的即時動態
•	可從鎖定畫面、控制中心或動作按鈕啟動或停止計時器

自動化

•	與「快捷指令」App 整合（透過「快捷指令」App 控制任務和計時器）
•	在 Be Focused App 中基於事件自動執行「快捷指令」

裝置支援

•	支援 Apple Watch
•	也適用於 Mac
•	支援深色和淺色模式

* 與 Mac 同步需要另外購買 Be Focused Pro for macOS。
** 與 Focus Matrix 的整合需要購買 Focus Matrix 的專業版。

tw.trackCensoredName: 拒之-骚扰电话批量拦截助手
tw.trackName: 拒之-骚扰电话批量拦截助手
tw.releaseNotes:
【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
tw.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

您是否對相同的舊小說感到厭倦？您是否對交互式故事遊戲、視覺小說、聊天類社交遊戲和獨立遊戲感興趣，但是您已經厭倦了相同的舊遊戲？如果是這樣，您應該查看《七天》，一部視覺小說、決策性的神秘遊戲。

《七天》是一部了不起的神秘視覺小說故事類遊戲。這是一個獨特、決策類的講故事遊戲，而用戶可以根據自己的選擇創建自己的獨特故事。

通過聊天風格的視覺小說類游戲，我們將提供最佳的故事遊戲體驗和豐富的神秘故事情節，專門適用於移動設備。這是一款給您強烈推薦的遊戲。


■ 詳細講解遊戲
您做出的每一個選擇都會改變您的故事。
每個小小的選擇都會改變您與同志們的關係，
並在關鍵時刻改變您和同志們的命運。

您可以是反派，或一位可信賴的同志。
一切都取決於您的選擇。

■ 概要
有的死靈在死亡世界中經受了復活的考驗。
死亡使者給他們分配了一項任務，而他們必須互相攻擊或共同合作。您的角色，基雷爾也必須完成分配給她的選擇性任務。
但是她的任務需要其他人去死......

您只有七天
您會做出什麼樣的選擇？

立即體驗這個發人深省的故事。

■ 遊戲特色
- 圖形新穎的小說類藝術品，具有驚人的圖形
- 在生與死之間切換的獨特遊戲設置
- 根據您的選擇而變化的故事情節
- 各種成就和隱藏的挑戰
- 根據故事的不同情節和結局
- 具有神秘感的文字冒險
- 精彩的講故事遊戲

- 對文字 / 互動內容感興趣，例如視覺小說、故事遊戲、聊天遊戲和社交遊戲

如果您發現任何問題或有好的建議，請將它們發送至help@buffstudio.com。我們將努力製作出更好的視覺小說、故事、療愈、獨立，講故事、冒險類遊戲。

此次發售的泰拉瑞亞， 將是完全買斷制的無內購版本，玩家在購買後將可以體驗遊戲的全內容。

Q：此次泰拉瑞亞PE版發售的版本是？
此次上線的遊戲版本是1.4.0.5，最新的1.4.3版本將在後續進行更新。由於心動版的《泰拉瑞亞》在引進之初，加入了例如【免費官方伺服器連線】【雲存檔】【語音聊天】等輔助功能，這也使得我們需要在外服PE的代碼上做額外開發，使得更新會有一定延遲。 目前植入工作已經在緊鑼密鼓的進行中，我們將在7月很快同步更新至1.4.3版本。對此給您帶來的不便，非常抱歉。如果因為版本滯後給您帶來了困擾，建議您可以先申請退款，在我們更新後再考慮入手，屆時我們也會同步開啟折扣。

Q：是否能與外服PE連線？
此次心動版的泰拉瑞亞為了給廣大移動端玩家提供更好的連線體驗，加入了官方服務器支持，而該功能需要依賴相同的遊戲版本。故我們發售的版本將不能支持與外服PE版本的私人服務器連線。如果是希望體驗更多私人服務器的版本，依舊建議大家優先考慮購買外服版本。

【遊戲特色】
對於那些新玩家們，《泰拉瑞亞》是一款總會給你不斷的驚喜的遊戲。
- 遊戲裡豐富的時間系統及天氣系統，四季與晝夜的交替，帶月荷鋤歸，說的就是你的生活。
- 玩家可通過成熟的物材合成系統，利用地圖上的資源，開始你的屠龍寶刀與金屋藏嬌的建造計劃吧！
-玩家可探索超過20個地圖，可以體驗到茂密的森林，荒蕪的沙漠，或是偶遇神秘的漂浮島，誤闖擁有童話般鮮豔明快色彩的神聖之地等等。
- 開放了300+不同的敵人和怪物，20+風格迥異的Boss，讓玩家體驗到酣暢淋漓的遊戲戰鬥系統。
- 遊戲擁有超過20名NPC可供玩家進行售賣道具、獲取治療、信息諮詢等互動：如治療玩家並幫助消除debuff的護士，出售各種機械的機械師，出售坐騎和寵物的動物學家等等。
- 遊戲內總道具數已超過3500個，玩家可通過掉落拾取、合成製作等方式獲取到建築材料、人物時裝、坐騎、稀有寶石等道具，以探索遊戲內的無限樂趣。
- 遊戲擁有極高的自由度，在這裡沒有任何需要玩家強制執行的主線或支線任務，有的只是白晝與黑夜的輪番更替。玩家不受任何人或事的限制，縱情的自由遊玩。
- 遊戲中始終充滿了輕鬆的打擊樂，富有打擊感的挖掘聲、怪物受到攻擊的聲音都讓遊戲充滿了趣味性。

人類踏足新世界，第一步需要的是勇氣，第二步需要的是朋友！

us.description:
Staying on task seems is a real challenge for our screen-bound generation. The Be Focused lets you get things done by breaking up individual tasks among discrete intervals, separated by short breaks. It’s a surprisingly effective way to retain motivation and focus. Create tasks, configure breaks and track your progress throughout the day, week or custom period. Use Be Focused on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac — everything stays perfectly in sync.

Task Management

•	Create and manage tasks
•	Add notes and due dates to tasks
•	Organize tasks with tags and filters
•	Paste task lists from other apps

Timer Control

•	Start, pause, or skip intervals
•	Auto-start the next interval (optionally)
•	Plan intervals needed for task completion and track accuracy
•	Manage completed intervals

Timer Customization

•	Set durations for work sessions, short and long breaks
•	Define number of intervals before a long break
•	Set a daily goal for completed intervals 
•	Assign different timer settings to individual tasks

Reports

•	View detailed reports to monitor your progress
•	Export your data in CSV format

Sounds and Notifications

•	Chronometer ticking sound with adjustable frequency
•	Variety of alarm sounds
•	Interactive notifications
•	Adjustable volume for alarms and chronometer

Integration

•	Sync across all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac) *
•	Integration with Focus Matrix to manage tasks using urgent/important principle **
•	Integration with Shortcuts app to automate workflow

Quick Access

•	Widgets for Lock Screen and Home Screen
•	Live activities for Lock Screen and Dynamic Island
•	Control to start or stop the timer from the Lock Screen, Controls Center, or Action Button

Automation

•	Integration with Shortcuts app (control tasks and timers via Shortcuts app)
•	Automate Shortcuts execution on events in Be Focused app

Device Support

•	Apple Watch support
•	Also available for Mac
•	Dark and Light mode support

* Sync with Mac requires Be Focused Pro for macOS, sold separately.
** Integration with Focus Matrix requires the Pro version of Focus Matrix, sold separately.

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

us.releaseNotes:
【更新内容】
1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰
3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
us.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...

◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

tr.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

tr.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

1. 免费！免费！拒之即日起永久免费！
2. 重磅推出「私语 - 量子加密输入法」，在任何软件上加密聊天，保护您的隐私信息，从根源杜绝电话骚扰

《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
tr.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

tr.description:
Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series.
It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.
You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless.


Story:

A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins...



Key Features:

- Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world.

- A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go?

- A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition.  And your life.

- Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed.  Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds.

- Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

tr.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

pt.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

pt.description:
Manter-se na tarefa parece ser um verdadeiro desafio para a nossa geração ligada às telas. O "Be Focused" permite realizar tarefas dividindo-as em intervalos discretos, separados por pequenas pausas. É uma maneira surpreendentemente eficaz de manter a motivação e o foco. Crie tarefas, configure pausas e monitore seu progresso ao longo do dia, semana ou período personalizado. Use o Be Focused no seu iPhone, iPad ou Mac — tudo permanece perfeitamente sincronizado.

Gerenciamento de Tarefas

•	Crie e gerencie tarefas
•	Adicione notas e datas de vencimento às tarefas
•	Organize tarefas com etiquetas e filtros
•	Cole listas de tarefas de outros aplicativos

Controle do Cronômetro

•	Inicie, pause ou pule intervalos
•	Início automático do próximo intervalo (opcional)
•	Planeje os intervalos necessários para concluir as tarefas e acompanhe a precisão
•	Gerencie intervalos concluídos

Personalização do Cronômetro

•	Defina durações para sessões de trabalho, pausas curtas e longas
•	Determine o número de intervalos antes de uma pausa longa
•	Defina uma meta diária de intervalos concluídos
•	Atribua diferentes configurações de cronômetro para tarefas individuais

Relatórios

•	Visualize relatórios detalhados para monitorar seu progresso
•	Exporte seus dados em formato CSV

Sons e Notificações

•	Som de tique-taque do cronômetro com frequência ajustável
•	Variedade de sons de alarme
•	Notificações interativas
•	Volume ajustável para alarmes e cronômetro

Integração

•	Sincronize entre todos os seus dispositivos (iPhone, iPad, Mac) *
•	Integração com o Focus Matrix para gerenciar tarefas usando o princípio urgente/importante **
•	Integração com o aplicativo Atalhos para automatizar fluxos de trabalho

Acesso Rápido

•	Widgets para a Tela Bloqueada e Tela de Início
•	Atividades ao Vivo para a Tela Bloqueada e Ilha Dinâmica
•	Controle para iniciar ou parar o cronômetro a partir da Tela Bloqueada, Central de Controle ou Botão de Ação

Automação

•	Integração com o aplicativo Atalhos (controle tarefas e cronômetros via aplicativo Atalhos)
•	Automatize a execução de Atalhos em eventos no aplicativo Be Focused

Compatibilidade de Dispositivos

•	Compatível com Apple Watch
•	Também disponível para Mac
•	Suporte aos modos Escuro e Claro

* A sincronização com o Mac requer o Be Focused Pro para macOS, vendido separadamente.
** A integração com o Focus Matrix requer a versão Pro do Focus Matrix, vendida separadamente.

pt.description:
Você consegue contaminar o mundo? Plague Inc. é uma mistura única de alta estratégia e simulação terrivelmente realista. 

Seu agente patogênico acabou de contaminar o 'Paciente zero'. Agora você deve acabar com a história da humanidade evoluindo para uma mortal Praga global, enquanto se adapta a tudo que a humanidade pode fazer para se defender. 

Brilhantemente executado, com jogabilidade inovadora e construido especificamente para iPhone e iPad, Plague Inc. é uma evolução do gênero de estratégia e leva os jogos em dispositivos móves (e você) a novos níveis. É Você contra o mundo - só o forte sobrevive! 

◈◈◈ Jogo #1 globalmente com mais de 500 milhões de jogos jogados ◈◈◈

Plague Inc. é um hit global com mais de meio milhão de classificações de 5 estrelas e reportagens em jornais como The Economist, New York Post, Boston Herald, The Guardian e London Metro! 

O desenvolvedor de Plague Inc. foi convidado a falar no CDC em Atlanta sobre os modelos de doenças do jogo!

▶ “O jogo cria um mundo convincente que engaja o público em tópicos sérios de saúde pública” – The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
▶ “Melhor jogo para tablet de 2012” - New York Daily News 
▶ “Plague Inc. vai captar sua atenção de todas as formas certas, e vai mantê-la” - Touch Arcade 
▶ “Não há como negar o alto nível de qualidade de Plague Inc.” - Modojo 
▶ “Plague Inc. não deveria ser tão divertido como é” – London Metro 
▶ “Vai deixar você na esperança de destruir o mundo, tudo em nome de um pouco de diversão” – Pocket Lint 
▶ “A jogabilidade de Plague Inc.'s é contagiosa” - Slide to Play 
▶ Vencedor – “Melhor jogo do ano” – Pocket Gamer
▶ “Matar bilhões nunca foi tão divertido” – IGN 

◈◈◈

Características: 
● Lindos gráficos retina com uma interface bastante refinada (Contágio garantido) 
● Mundo hiperrealistas, altamente detalhado, com IA avançada (Gerenciamento de epidemia) 
● Sistema abrangente de ajudar e tutorial (Eu sou a lenda da ajuda) 
● 12 diferentes tipos de doenças com estratégias radicalmente diferentes para dominar (12 Macacos?) 
● Funcionalidade completa de Salvamento/Carregamento (28 salvamentos depois!) 
● 50+ países para contaminar, centenas de caractetísticas para evoluir e milhares de eventos mundiais para se adaptar (Evolução pandêmica) 
● Suporte total ao jogo 
● Atualizações de expansão acrescentam o Verme Neurax que controla a mente, o Vírus Necroa que produz zumbis, Corridas de velocidade e Cenários da vida real!
● Você consegue salvar o mundo? Assuma o controle e vença uma doença mundial na nossa maior expansão!
● Enfrente as Doenças Diárias, ganhe melhorias poderosas e compita contra o mundo no Modo Surto!


Traduzido para Inglês, Alemão, Espanhol, Português do Brasil, Italiano, Francês, Japonês, Coreano e Russo. (mais em breve) 

P.S. Dê um tapa nas suas costas se entendeu todos as referências da literatura do tema! 

Preço promocional especial para celebrar o fato de ser o 5º jogo de iPhone mais popular de 2015!

3. 适配iOS26界面，支持液态玻璃UI
4. 更新狐智AI模型，新学习了近期的号码样本，去除了历史废弃号码库，新增普通模式号码8W+，新增国家反诈数据库3W+
5. 更新香港官方骚扰号码库号码，新增号码4W+
6. 修复白名单部分授权通讯录时显示异常的问题
7. 完全重构代码，大幅优化安装包大小至8M


《给拒之用户的一封信》

亲爱的拒之用户：

	感谢您选择并信任「拒之」。

	「拒之」1.0版本发布于2020年7月6日，在国内首创了基于号段的骚扰电话拦截，为大家提供了稳定、有效、易用的号段拦截功能。

	自此之后，我们不断更新迭代了26个版本，并在2021年6月7日发布「拒之」2.0版本，开创性地推出了「狐拒自定义」「狐云大数据」「狐智AI拦截」三重拦截功能，提供了全方位的强力拦截体验。

	我们很欣慰地看到，在我们的持续引领下，同类产品如雨后春笋般地涌现，越来越多的App也支持了「拒之」首创的号段拦截与云端号段拦截库功能，大家都朝着让用户远离骚扰、回归清静的方向努力，这是我们乐于看到的行业进步，也证明了「拒之」最初的愿景正在被更广泛地实现。

	但我们也越来越清醒地意识到：拦截，终究是被动防御。骚扰电话永不枯竭的真正根源，是个人隐私信息在无数App、聊天记录、社交媒体中被反复泄漏，是在大数据分析、用户画像、AI模型训练中被不断挖掘、关联和滥用。号码可以被拦截，但用户画像却无法被屏蔽，当你的年龄、位置、消费习惯、社交关系都被打上个人标签，骚扰电话就不再是“广撒网”，而是精准的“找到你”。所以，我们不再只挡电话，而是保护你的一切信息。

	我们决定做两件事：

	第一，「拒之」即日起永久免费。
	所有拦截功能全面开放，免费下载、无广告、无订阅。
	
	第二，推出「私语」量子加密输入法。
	在任何聊天软件中，用「私语」输入法即可实现消息加密，手机号、住址、对话内容不再明文传输，从根源杜绝信息泄漏。

	骚扰电话不会自己消失，但我们可以选择不再裸奔。

	从「拒之」到「私语」，我们依然是那个不愿让你被打扰的团队。

	感谢六年的陪伴。

	这一次，我们终于把答案从「拦截」改成了「保护」。

「拒之」团队
2026年5月16日
pt.description:
【功能特色】
1. 狐拒：自定义号段匹配规则，最多支持6位通配符
2. 狐云：基于大数据分析，一键拦截高频骚扰号段来电
3. 狐智：AI智能拦截，强力模式拦得多，普通模式拦得准
4. 基于已知号码库的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)已开启
5. 号码白名单，一键导入通讯录，重要来电不再被拒
6. iCloud自动同步，自定义号段云端存储，换机无忧

【使用限制】
1. 重要的事情只说一遍，不能拦截所有陌生号码，不能拦截区号下的所有号码，不能拦所有国际号码！
2. 因系统来电阻止功能组件限制，自定义号段拦截号码数上限为200万个，通配符个数限制在6位及以下，因此不支持自定义区号的号段拦截。
3. 因国际号码不确定性因素较多，号段规律性较差，对于国际号码(非+86)、香港(+852)、澳门(+853)、台湾(+886)的来电受通配符个数限制无法按照号段拦截。狐智AI中提供的境外号码拦截功能(BETA)，是基于已知号码库实现的拦截，能够提供一定的拦截效果，但不能拦截所有国际号码。
4. 狐云大数据的“拦截XX开头号段”，为基于大数据收录的高频骚扰号段区域分类，并非将XX开头号码完全拦截。狐云列表中所有项目均可点击查看其具体拦截内容，已收录号段范围中的号码将会被拦截，未收录的则不会拦截。其中的高频骚扰号段、国际号码实际拦截效果依赖于用户的不断提交和对大数据的持续分析，您可以通过「号码提交」功能来帮助更多用户识别和自动拦截。
5. 狐智AI拦截的强力模式可大幅提高骚扰号码拦截率，但可能存在号码误判漏接，包括但不限于运营商、银行、快递、外卖员等电话号码，您可以切换到狐智AI拦截的普通模式，或使用号码白名单功能来避免拦截。

【内购项目】
1. 项目名称：6包野果（6元）、12包野果（12元）、30包野果（30元）、698包野果（698元）
2. 项目类型：消耗型项目
3. 项目说明：当您安装拒之App后，您已可以永久使用拒之的全部功能。如果您觉得我们做的好，可以在「支持我们」中通过内购项目来给我们鼓励，您的支持是拒之前行的动力。
4. 温馨提示：内购项目为消耗消费，1包野果为1元，购买成功后无法退款，请您适度鼓励、理性消费。

【隐私政策】
1.「拒之」采用iOS原生支持的来电阻止框架开发，不会主动收集您的任何信息。
2.「拒之自定义」中的拦截规则、拦截号码均由您自主设定。
3.「狐云大数据」、「狐智AI拦截」在使用时需要请求网络权限以获取后台数据，但不会收集您的个人信息。
4.「iCloud自动同步」功能使用iOS提供的用户个人隐私空间存储您的号段和设置数据，与您的AppleID绑定，他人无权访问。
5. 如果您自愿使用「号码提交」功能向我们提交号码样本，则仅会收集您提交的号码数据，此外不会上传其他任何信息，如果您自愿提交号码样本，则表示您同意开发者以任意方式处理该样本，包括但不限于进行大数据分析、共享给其他用户作为拦截号段参考等。

You will be able to explore your eating habits visually and improve your eating habits. No calories and no numbers are shown in the app! 

Features:
+ Beautifully minimalist food diary app
+ In-App Camera And Filter
+ No calories No Pressure
+ Visualizes all your diets and shows your diet balance clearly!
+ Crazy and Interactive Foody Face
+ Learn how to eat mindfully and correctly right now!

Don’t make Foody Face angry! Tap download right now!

----------

The inspiration behind FoodyLife is that nowadays people pay little attention to what they eat and often eat unhealthy food. Although there are many similar apps on the market (e.g. Fitness App, Calorie counter...), most of them focus mainly on “numbers”, such as how many calories the user has eaten and how long the user should exercise to get rid of those calories, or sending the user notifications when they should get up to exercise or if they have eaten too much.

FoodyLife’ is an app that helps users track their daily diet by allowing them to keep their own food diary. The app shows neither calories nor numbers; instead, users have only to take a picture, enter their diet information, then they are able their overall diet balance. It is very simple and highly effective. Users can explore their eating habits visually, improving self-consciousness about eating habits.

pt.description:
Vocês já está cansado das mesas velhas histórias? Você está interessado em jogos narrativos, romances gráficos, jogos baseados em chat e jogos indie, mas você está cansado da mesma coisa? Se sim, você deveria checar '7Days', um jogo de mistério com romance gráfico e baseado em decisões. 

'7Days' é um jogo narrativo de mistério com romance gráfico. É um jogo narrativo único baseado em decisões onde o usuário pode criar suas histórias baseadas na escolha que ele fizer.

Nós fornecemos a melhor experiência de um jogo narrativo com um enredo de mistério em estilo bate papo, projetado para dispositivos móveis. É um jogo altamente recomendado para você.

■ Jogo explicado
Toda escolha muda a sua história.
Cada pequena escolha irá mudar seu relacionamento com seus companheiros,
e altera seu destino e de seus companheiros nos momentos críticos.

Você pode ser o vilão ou um companheiro de confiança.
Tudo depende de suas escolhas.

■ Resumo
Existem espíritos que foram colocados ao testa para ressurreição no mundo da morte.
O mensageiro da morte os atribuiu com a tarefa de se atacarem ou trabalharem juntos. Seu personagem, Kirell, deve completar tambés as tarefas baseadas em escolhas que lhe foram atribuídas.
Mas suas tarefas necessitam que outros morram...

Você só tem 7 dias
O que você irá escolher?

Experimente está história que provoca a imaginação agora mesmo.

■ Características do jogo
- Estilo quadrinho com gráficos incríveis
- Enredo único que alterna entre a vida e a morte
- O enredo muda de acordo com suas escolhas
- Várias conquistas e desafios ocultos
- Episódios e finais diferentes baseados na história
- Aventura de texto com uma sensação misteriosa
- Enredo excitante

■ Recomendado para aqueles que:
- Estão interessados em conteúdo/texto interativo como romances gráficos, jogos narrativos, jogos de bate papo e jogos sociais
- São apaixonados por jogos indie como 'Undertale'
- Estão procurando por uma jogo narrativo com elementos de mistério e/ou terror
- Estão procurando por O jogo e estão cansados dos jogos narrativos de sempre
- Estão interessados em diferentes tipos de jogos de aventura
Nós também recomendamos 'Underworld Office: Ghost Game', outro de nossos grandes jogos.

■ Nós garantimos a diversão. Baixe e experimente agora

Se você encontrar algum problema ou tem alguma sugestão, por favor, envie para nós em help@buffstudio.com. Nós trabalhamos duro para fazer os melhores jogos de aventura, narrativos, indie, restauradores e romances gráficos.

■ Nós precisamos da sua ajuda para fazer jogos narrativos melhores. Por favor, recomende este jogo narrativo para sua família e amigos. Será de grande ajuda para nós.

pt.description:
Sun Seeker is a comprehensive solar tracking & compass app. It shows the sun’s hourly direction intervals, its equinoxes, winter & summer solstice paths, sunrise & sunset times, twilight times, shadowed periods, UV Index, solar irradiance, golden and blue hours, eclipses & more. The app allows you to add sun-event notifications & has a widget and watch app showing the day’s solar data & position on an arc. The 3D View shows the solar direction for each sunlight hour. Sun Seeker has both a flat compass view & a 3D Augmented Reality (AR) view to show the solar position & path.

The app is useful for - 

▶ Photographers- to plan shoots according to the golden hour or blue hour & optimal sunlight conditions, sunrise & sunset times & directions.
▶ Cinematographers- enables you to find the solar exposure, directions, shadow, sunrise & sunset times for any location.
▶ Real Estate Buyers- can use the app before buying a property to check the sun's path & to find the solar exposure of properties.
▶ Drivers - Sun Seeker lets you track the sun path & movement during the days & helps drivers know the sun position to find how long the car will remain in the shade at any given parking spot.
▶ Campers & Picnickers- for anyone planning a day out, this app will help in finding where to camp, sit or pitch an umbrella depending on the sunlight & sun direction. 
▶ Gardeners- Sun Seeker can also help with finding optimal planting locations & seasonal sunlight hours as a sunrise calendar
▶ Architects & Surveyors- for visualising the spatial variability of the solar angle throughout the year & using the compass app as a sun surveyor & calendar to determine the sunlight directions.
 
Main Features
* Sun Seeker is a sun locator which uses GPS, magnetometer & gyroscope to find the correct solar position & sun path for your current location.
* Flat compass view shows current solar position, diurnal solar angle & elevation (separated into day & night segments), sun shadow length ratio, atmospheric path thickness.
* 3D augmented reality (AR) camera overlay view shows the sun's current position, and it's path with hour points marked. You can scroll through time to preview changes throughout the year or day, and an optional pointer to guide you towards the current location of the sun & help you find the sun's direction. 
* Map view shows solar direction arrows, sun path & elevations for each hour of the day.
* Choose any date to view sun position & path on that day. You can view sunset & sunrise times for each day as well.
* Choose any location on earth (includes 40,000+ cities or custom locations available offline, as well as a comprehensive online map search capability).
* Get additional details including sunrise, sunset & culmination times, maximum elevation, civil, nautical & astronomical twilight periods of the sun.
* Optional device notifications for all manner of sun-related periods & events, such as golden hour or blue hour, various twilight periods, or sun crossing a given compass heading or elevation.

The Sun Seeker app has been featured in numerous high-profile blogs, websites & publications, including Wall Street Journal, Washington Post, Sydney Morning Herald etc. "Truly amazing", "Incredible", "Brilliant - the most genuinely useful application of augmented reality - ever!"

Check out our YouTube video here: https://bit.ly/2Rf0CkO
Simply search YouTube for "Sun Seeker app" to find many videos, websites & blogs created by our enthusiastic users

FAQs
* See https://bit.ly/2FIPJq2 - also easily accessible from the app's info screen

Note
* The compass accuracy depends on having an undistorted magnetic field around your device. If you use it close to metallic objects or electrical equipment, directional accuracy may be impaired. The device’s compass accuracy can be optimised by calibrating it prior to use. See app’s FAQs for more help.

Desta vez, você pode aprender acordes e escalas visualmente. Explore a estrutura dos acordes movendo diferentes notas de cada acorde. Você obterá uma compreensão completa da origem dos nomes dos acordes. Este aplicativo pode gerar toda a estrutura de acordes que você imaginar, facilitando consultá-los e memorizá-los. O processo de entender música deve ser claro e simples. O GenChord ajuda você a descobrir os princípios essenciais por trás da música.
